activities.title: Afternoon Piano Concert
activities.description: Live piano performance featuring classics and resident requests.

activities.title: Morning Stretch & Balance
activities.description: Gentle guided stretching and balance exercises done from a seated or standing position.

activities.title: Chair Yoga
activities.description: Low-impact yoga class using chairs for additional support.

activities.title: Resident Choir Rehearsal
activities.description: Practice session for residents who enjoy group singing.

activities.title: Sunday Hymn Sing-Along
activities.description: Group hymn singing with piano accompaniment.

activities.title: Watercolor Landscapes
activities.description: Instructor-led watercolor painting focusing on simple landscapes.

activities.title: Classic Bingo
activities.description: Multiple rounds of bingo with small prizes.

activities.title: Health Talk: Managing Diabetes
activities.description: Nurse-led talk on managing diabetes through diet, activity, and medication.

activities.title: Saturday Social Tea
activities.description: Afternoon tea with light refreshments and conversation.

activities.title: Morning Nondenominational Prayer
activities.description: Quiet time for shared prayer and reflection.

activities.title: Courtyard Walk & Chat
activities.description: Leisurely walk in the courtyard with staff supervision.

activities.title: New Resident Welcome Orientation
activities.description: Overview of community services, activities, and dining for new residents and families.

activities.title: Spring Family Music Night
activities.description: An evening of live music open to residents and their families.

activities.title: Gentle Tai Chi
activities.description: Slow, flowing movements to support balance and relaxation.

additional_service_options.label: Medication Management
additional_service_options.description: Daily medication reminders, administration assistance, and monthly medication review by nursing staff.

additional_service_options.label: Housekeeping (Weekly)
additional_service_options.description: Light housekeeping of resident apartment once per week, including dusting, vacuuming, and trash removal.

additional_service_options.label: Housekeeping (Every Other Week)
additional_service_options.description: Light housekeeping of resident apartment every other week.

additional_service_options.label: Personal Laundry Service
additional_service_options.description: Pickup, washing, folding, and delivery of personal laundry items.

additional_service_options.label: Personal Care Package
additional_service_options.description: Assistance with bathing, grooming, and dressing up to twice daily as needed.

care_level_options.label: Assisted Living - Standard
care_level_options.description: For residents needing moderate support with daily activities such as bathing, dressing, and medication reminders.

care_level_options.label: Assisted Living - Enhanced
care_level_options.description: Higher level of support including more frequent personal care and safety checks.

care_level_options.label: Memory Care - Standard
care_level_options.description: Supportive environment for residents with early to mid-stage memory loss, including secure neighborhood and structured programming.

care_level_options.label: Memory Care - Enhanced
care_level_options.description: Increased caregiver-to-resident ratio and specialized programming for residents with higher care needs.

care_level_options.label: Independent Living - Basic
care_level_options.description: For active residents who are largely independent and want maintenance-free living with optional services.

care_plans.name: Assisted Living Basic
care_plans.description: Includes support with basic activities of daily living, three meals per day, and access to community activities.

care_plans.name: Assisted Living Plus
care_plans.description: For residents who require additional personal care and cueing throughout the day.

care_plans.name: Memory Care Value
care_plans.description: Entry-level memory support for residents with early-stage memory loss.
services_included: Two meals per day with snacks

care_plans.name: Memory Care Essential
care_plans.description: Core memory care program providing three meals daily and assistance with daily routines.
services_included: Three meals per day plus snacks

care_plans.name: Memory Care Comfort
care_plans.description: Enhanced memory care services with added one-on-one engagement time.

care_plans.name: Memory Care Plus
care_plans.description: Highest level of memory support with increased staffing and specialized behavioral support.

care_plans.name: Independent Living Basic
care_plans.description: Ideal for residents who are independent but enjoy the convenience of some included services.

care_plans.name: Independent Living Premium
care_plans.description: Expanded services for independent residents wanting more dining and housekeeping support.

care_plans.name: Respite Care - Standard
care_plans.description: Short-term stay option with full access to assisted living services.

care_plans.name: Skilled Nursing Standard
care_plans.description: 24-hour nursing care for residents with complex medical needs.

dishes.name: Grilled Salmon with Quinoa Pilaf
dishes.description: Herb-marinated salmon fillet served with a warm quinoa and vegetable pilaf.
dishes.ingredients: Salmon, quinoa, olive oil, lemon, mixed vegetables, herbs, salt, pepper
dishes.preparation_notes: Salmon is grilled with minimal oil; quinoa is cooked in low-sodium vegetable broth.

dishes.name: Hearty Turkey & White Bean Stew
dishes.description: Slow-simmered turkey and white beans with tomatoes, carrots, and herbs.
dishes.ingredients: Turkey breast, white beans, tomatoes, carrots, onions, celery, herbs, low-sodium broth
dishes.preparation_notes: Prepared with skinless turkey and low-sodium broth; no added sugar.

dishes.name: Vegetable Stir-Fry with Brown Rice
dishes.description: Colorful mix of seasonal vegetables stir-fried in a light garlic-ginger sauce, served over brown rice.
dishes.ingredients: Broccoli, bell peppers, carrots, snap peas, brown rice, garlic, ginger, low-sodium soy sauce
dishes.preparation_notes: Sauce made with reduced-sodium soy sauce; cooked in a small amount of canola oil.

dishes.name: Lemon Herb Roasted Chicken
dishes.description: Oven-roasted chicken thigh seasoned with lemon and fresh herbs, served with steamed green beans.
dishes.ingredients: Chicken thigh, lemon, rosemary, thyme, olive oil, green beans, salt, pepper
dishes.preparation_notes: Excess skin and fat trimmed before roasting.

dishes.name: Whole Wheat Pasta with Marinara
dishes.description: Whole wheat spaghetti topped with house-made tomato basil marinara and a sprinkle of parmesan.
dishes.ingredients: Whole wheat pasta, tomatoes, onions, garlic, basil, olive oil, parmesan cheese, salt, pepper
dishes.preparation_notes: Marinara sauce simmered slowly with fresh herbs; pasta cooked al dente.

dishes.name: Baked Cod with Roasted Vegetables
dishes.description: Flaky baked cod filet served with a medley of roasted root vegetables.
dishes.ingredients: Cod, carrots, parsnips, potatoes, olive oil, lemon, herbs, salt, pepper
dishes.preparation_notes: Cod baked in parchment to retain moisture; vegetables lightly seasoned.

dishes.name: Chicken Caesar Salad
dishes.description: Romaine lettuce topped with grilled chicken, parmesan, croutons, and Caesar dressing.
dishes.ingredients: Romaine lettuce, chicken breast, parmesan, croutons, Caesar dressing
dishes.preparation_notes: Dressing served on the side by default.

dishes.name: Garden Vegetable Omelet
dishes.description: Three-egg omelet filled with peppers, onions, spinach, and mushrooms.
dishes.ingredients: Eggs, bell peppers, onions, spinach, mushrooms, cheddar cheese, salt, pepper
dishes.preparation_notes: Available with egg whites only upon request.

dishes.name: Steel-Cut Oatmeal with Berries
dishes.description: Warm steel-cut oats topped with fresh seasonal berries and a sprinkle of cinnamon.
dishes.ingredients: Steel-cut oats, water, milk, mixed berries, cinnamon
dishes.preparation_notes: No added sugar; residents may add sweetener if desired.

dishes.name: Fresh Fruit Cup with Cottage Cheese
dishes.description: Assorted fresh fruit served with a side of low-fat cottage cheese.
dishes.preparation_notes: Fruit selection varies by season; no added syrup.

dishes.name: Hearty Lentil Vegetable Soup
dishes.description: Slow-simmered lentils with tomatoes, carrots, and celery in a vegetable broth.
dishes.ingredients: Lentils, tomatoes, carrots, celery, onions, garlic, vegetable broth, herbs
dishes.preparation_notes: Made with low-sodium broth and no animal products.

dishes.name: Roast Beef with Mashed Potatoes
dishes.description: Slow-roasted beef served with creamy mashed potatoes and gravy.
dishes.ingredients: Beef, potatoes, butter, milk, flour, salt, pepper
dishes.preparation_notes: Gravy prepared with pan drippings and thickened with flour.

dishes.name: Baked Chicken with Sweet Potato
dishes.description: Oven-baked chicken breast served with a roasted sweet potato and steamed broccoli.
dishes.ingredients: Chicken breast, sweet potato, broccoli, olive oil, herbs, salt, pepper
dishes.preparation_notes: Chicken is baked with herbs and a light drizzle of olive oil.

dishes.name: Quinoa & Black Bean Bowl
dishes.description: Protein-packed bowl with quinoa, black beans, roasted corn, and avocado.
dishes.ingredients: Quinoa, black beans, corn, avocado, cilantro, lime, spices
dishes.preparation_notes: Dressed with lime and herbs; no added salt at the table.

dishes.name: Herb-Crusted Pork Loin
dishes.description: Roasted pork loin with an herb crust, served with roasted Brussels sprouts.
dishes.ingredients: Pork loin, herbs, olive oil, Brussels sprouts, salt, pepper
dishes.preparation_notes: Lean center-cut pork used; visible fat trimmed before roasting.

staff_members.title: Director of Nursing
staff_members.bio: Jane Smith is a registered nurse with over 15 years of experience in geriatric and memory care. She oversees all clinical services and leads our nursing team in providing person-centered care.

staff_members.title: Executive Director
staff_members.bio: Michael Lee has led senior living communities for over a decade, focusing on hospitality, safety, and resident satisfaction.

staff_members.title: Life Enrichment Director
staff_members.bio: Sophia designs and oversees a robust calendar of social, educational, and wellness programs tailored to residents’ interests and abilities.

staff_members.title: Dining Services Manager
staff_members.bio: Carlos leads the culinary team, emphasizing fresh ingredients, resident feedback, and specialized therapeutic diets.

staff_members.title: Transportation Coordinator
staff_members.bio: Linda coordinates all resident transportation, including medical appointments, shopping trips, and community outings.

staff_members.title: Lead Physical Therapist
staff_members.bio: David provides on-site physical therapy services and develops individualized mobility and fall-prevention programs.

staff_members.title: Housekeeping Supervisor
staff_members.bio: Maria and her team help ensure all resident apartments and common areas are clean, safe, and welcoming.

therapy_service_options.label: Physical Therapy
therapy_service_options.description: One-on-one physical therapy focused on strength, balance, and mobility, ordered by a physician.

therapy_service_options.label: Occupational Therapy
therapy_service_options.description: Therapy to maintain or improve independence with daily tasks like dressing, bathing, and grooming.

therapy_service_options.label: Speech & Swallow Therapy
therapy_service_options.description: Support for speech, language, and swallowing concerns related to aging or neurological conditions.

therapy_service_options.label: Small-Group Therapeutic Exercise
therapy_service_options.description: Staff-led small group sessions focused on gentle strengthening and flexibility.

transportation_plan_options.label: No Transportation Package
transportation_plan_options.description: No recurring transportation services selected; rides may be arranged and billed individually where available.

transportation_plan_options.label: Medical Appointments Only
transportation_plan_options.description: Includes scheduled shuttle rides to local medical appointments on designated service days.

transportation_plan_options.label: All Community Outings
transportation_plan_options.description: Unlimited access to scheduled transportation for medical visits, shopping, and recreational outings.

transportation_services.name: Weekday Medical Shuttle
transportation_services.description: Complimentary shuttle service to local primary care, specialist, and therapy appointments within a 10-mile radius.

transportation_services.name: Medical Express Shuttle
transportation_services.description: Reserved shuttle for appointments at the regional medical center, scheduled twice daily.

transportation_services.name: Town Center Shopping Shuttle
transportation_services.description: Weekly group trip to the local grocery store, pharmacy, and bank.

transportation_services.name: Recreation Outings Bus
transportation_services.description: Trips to museums, parks, and community events scheduled on weekends.

transportation_services.name: Sunday Worship Shuttle
transportation_services.description: Transportation to several nearby churches and synagogues for Sunday and holiday services.

transportation_services.name: On-Demand Medical Escort Van
transportation_services.description: Individual door-to-door transportation with staff escort for higher-need residents.

transportation_services.name: Local Errands Loop
transportation_services.description: Rotating route that stops at the post office, library, and senior center.

menu_items.notes: Served with choice of milk and no-sugar sweetener.
Whole wheat pasta; grated parmesan on the side.
Classic comfort entrée with brown gravy.
Cup or bowl; pairs well with any entrée.
Dressing and croutons served on the side.

housing_options.label: Private Studio
housing_options.description: Cozy private studio apartment with kitchenette and accessible bathroom. Ideal for residents who prefer a smaller, easy-to-navigate living space.

housing_options.label: Shared Suite
housing_options.description: Larger suite with a shared living area and private bedrooms, designed for residents who enjoy companionship.

housing_options.label: One-Bedroom Apartment
housing_options.description: Spacious one-bedroom layout with separate living room and bedroom for added privacy and storage.

housing_options.label: Two-Bedroom Companion Apartment
housing_options.description: Two-bedroom apartment suitable for couples or companion living, featuring a shared living room and kitchenette.

housing_options.label: Companion Room
housing_options.description: Comfortable shared bedroom option with privacy curtains and individualized storage for each resident.

rooms.name: Private Studio 101
rooms.description: Sunny ground-floor private studio near the main lounge, with a full private bath and kitchenette.

rooms.name: Private Studio 102
rooms.description: Ground-floor corner studio with extra window, private bathroom, and easy access to dining.

rooms.name: Private Studio 103
rooms.description: Our largest ground-floor private studio with a spacious sitting area, private bath, and extra closet space.

rooms.name: Private Studio 104 (Shared Bath)
rooms.description: Economy studio option on the ground floor with a shared hallway bathroom.

rooms.name: Private Studio 105
rooms.description: Cozy studio with private bath, currently reserved for a pending move-in.

rooms.name: Private Studio 201
rooms.description: Second-floor studio with elevator access and a private bath.

rooms.name: Private Studio 202
rooms.description: Updated second-floor studio with upgraded finishes and private bathroom.

rooms.name: Private Studio 301 Deluxe
rooms.description: Top-floor deluxe studio with private bath and expansive campus views.

rooms.name: Shared Suite 201
rooms.description: Two-bedroom shared suite with a common living area and shared private bathroom.

rooms.name: Shared Suite 202
rooms.description: Bright corner shared suite with extra windows and private bath, currently occupied.

rooms.name: One-Bedroom 101
rooms.description: Spacious one-bedroom apartment on the ground floor with separate living room and bedroom.

rooms.name: One-Bedroom 201
rooms.description: One-bedroom apartment with balcony overlooking the courtyard.

rooms.name: One-Bedroom 301 Deluxe
rooms.description: Deluxe one-bedroom with extra-large living room, currently reserved.

rooms.name: Two-Bedroom 101
rooms.description: Ground-floor two-bedroom companion apartment with shared living room and bath.

rooms.name: Two-Bedroom 201
rooms.description: Spacious second-floor two-bedroom with large windows and ample storage.

rooms.name: Companion Room 101
rooms.description: Shared bedroom on the ground floor with privacy curtains and a shared private bath.

rooms.name: Companion Room 201
rooms.description: Second-floor shared companion room, currently occupied.
